title: isonandra lanceolata var. montana
intro: Isonandra lanceolata var. montana, also known as the mountain isonandra, is a plant species within the Isonandra genus, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Isonandra lanceolata var. montana include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or infused in hot water to create a medicinal tea that can be consumed for its therapeutic properties.
